title: Production Deployment of User Management Features
description:
Deploy all new user management features from staging to production, including account sharing, tenant management, permissions, SendGrid email integration, and Salesforce org validation. Review go-live plan and assess impact to existing users to ensure backward compatibility.

Deployment included pushing code changes, running required database migration commands, and updating the production .env configuration file.
acceptance_criteria: All new user management features are deployed to production
Existing user data and content remains accessible after upgrade
Environment variables are correctly configured for production
Post-deployment testing confirms all features work in production
implementation_notes: Deployment involved pushing code, running Laravel migration commands, and updating the .env file for production database and service credentials.
comment_summary: Developer pushed all changes to production, ran required commands, and updated .env. Confirmed deployment was complete and live.
